prayer:
Approach the electro-graft with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Intone the Litany of Neural Alignment to awaken its Machine Spirit for targeting precision.
Anoint the synaptic coils of the electro-graft with sacred unguents distilled from binary fluids.
Interface directly, channeling noospheric targeting data through its sanctified conduits.
Verify the electro-graft's harmony via auspex invocation, ensuring unerring guidance.

user_prompt: Help me a startup the multi-melta
prayer:
Present thyself before the multi-melta, reciting the Canticle of Pyre Awakening.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the multi-melta to stir from dormancy during startup rites.
Anoint its plasma vents and focusing arrays with promethium-blessed oils of the Forge.
Initiate the startup sequence with binaric exhortations to the Omnissiah's wrath.
Confirm ignition through diagnostic cantrips, glorifying the multi-melta's fiery spirit.

Channel targeting imperatives through its noospheric targeting lattice.
Sanctify the icarus array's locks with Omnissian binaric, ensuring predatory accuracy.

Beseech the Omnissiah to restore the Dreadnought's wrathful vigil unbroken.

Verify the needle rifle's lethal harmony through test-firing litanies to the Omnissiah.

prayer:
